emails.subject: J.P. Morgan Futures Inc. ("JP")
emails.body: J.P. Morgan Futures Inc. ("JP") Sheila: Just a few questions about this futures agreement: (1) Is it OK for JP to combine our orders with orders of other clients and JP's affiliates? (2) Is it OK (after we deposit property into our account) for JP to return "property of like or equivalent kind or amount"? (3) Do you want to agree to an interest rate (on customer funds) upfront or only "as agreed from time to time"? Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com

emails.subject: J.P. Morgan Futures Inc. ("JP")
emails.body: SARA, Notes below. Gary is going to an offsite meeting with JP Morgan next week and has requested that he would like this in place when he goes. Many thanks. Sheila Forwarded by Sheila Glover/HOU/ECT on 02/22/2001 08:25 AM From: Sara Shackleton on 02/21/2001 04:43 PM

emails.subject: Re: J.P. Morgan Futures Inc. ("JP")
emails.body: Re: J.P. Morgan Futures Inc. ("JP") I'm sending my comments to Thomas Alterson within the hour. He is not the lawyer. Sara Shackleton Enron North America Corp. 1400 Smith Street, EB 3801a Houston, Texas 77002 713-853-5620 (phone) 713-646-3490 (fax) sara.shackleton@enron.com Sheila Glover 02/22/2001 08:25 AM
